completion_promises.evidence: Created src/forge/pipeline/forward_propagation.py. TestModuleStructure verifies module.__name__ == 'forge.pipeline.forward_propagation' and that the file lives under src/forge/pipeline/. Importable via `from forge.pipeline.forward_propagation import ...`.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Exports `ContextRecipe` Pydantic model with fields: `producer_stage: StageClass`, `artefact_kind: Literal['text', 'path', 'path-list']`, `context_flag: str` (e.g. `--context`), `description: str`
completion_promises.evidence: ContextRecipe(BaseModel) is exported in __all__ with exactly the four required fields. producer_stage is annotated as StageClass; artefact_kind is the documented Literal; context_flag and description are non-empty str (min_length=1). Frozen + extra='forbid'. TestContextRecipeModel covers field set, types, Literal acceptance/rejection, and frozen/min-length validation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Exports `PROPAGATION_CONTRACT: dict[StageClass, ContextRecipe]` with exactly seven entries, one per non-product-owner stage
completion_promises.evidence: PROPAGATION_CONTRACT is exported in __all__, typed as dict[StageClass, ContextRecipe], with len == 7 and keys == StageClass members minus PRODUCT_OWNER. TestPropagationContractContents asserts cardinality, key set, value type, and that PRODUCT_OWNER is excluded.

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.ARCHITECT] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=PRODUCT_OWNER, artefact_kind='text', context_flag='--context', description='product-owner approved charter'). Verified by parametrised test_each_contract_row_matches_task_brief[architect-...].

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.SYSTEM_ARCH] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=ARCHITECT, artefact_kind='text', context_flag='--context', description='architect approved output'). Verified by parametrised test row [system-arch-...].

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.SYSTEM_DESIGN] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=SYSTEM_ARCH, artefact_kind='path-list', context_flag='--context', description='system-arch artefact paths'). Verified by parametrised test row [system-design-...].

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.FEATURE_SPEC] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=SYSTEM_DESIGN, artefact_kind='text', context_flag='--context', description='system-design feature catalogue entry'). Verified by parametrised test row [feature-spec-...].

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.FEATURE_PLAN] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=FEATURE_SPEC, artefact_kind='path', context_flag='--context', description='feature-spec artefact path'). Verified by parametrised test row [feature-plan-...].

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.AUTOBUILD] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=FEATURE_PLAN, artefact_kind='path', context_flag='--context', description='feature-plan artefact path'). Verified by parametrised test row [autobuild-...].

PROPAGATION_CONTRACT[StageClass.PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW] = ContextRecipe(producer_stage=AUTOBUILD, artefact_kind='text', context_flag='--context', description='autobuild branch ref + commit summary'). Verified by parametrised test row [pull-request-review-...].

completion_promises.criterion_text: Module passes a self-validation check at import: every key is reachable from `PRODUCT_OWNER` via the `STAGE_PREREQUISITES` chain from TASK-MAG7-001
completion_promises.evidence: _validate_propagation_contract(PROPAGATION_CONTRACT, STAGE_PREREQUISITES) is invoked at module bottom. It asserts each consumer is in STAGE_PREREQUISITES, each recipe.producer_stage is an immediate prerequisite, and walks every consumer back to PRODUCT_OWNER via STAGE_PREREQUISITES (raises on cycles or orphaned chains). TestSelfValidationAtImport covers the canonical-pass path plus three rejection branches (unknown consumer, wrong producer, orphaned reachability) and the standalone reachability walk.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Both new files compile under py_compile, all lines are <=88 chars (Black-compatible per .claude/rules/code-style.md), use `from __future__ import annotations`, full type hints, snake_case/PascalCase/UPPER_CASE per the style rule, and follow the AAA pattern in tests with descriptive names. No ruff/black config is declared in pyproject.toml so a tighter formatter run could not be executed; the code matches the surrounding forge.pipeline / forge.dispatch style verbatim.
